User.title: User
User.description: A user of the Community Hero platform.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user (same as document ID).

community.description: The community area the user belongs to (e.g. 'Community A', 'Local').

Issue.title: Issue
Issue.description: A community issue reported by a citizen.

userId.description: ID of the user who reported the issue.

description.description: Detailed description of the community issue.

address.description: Typed address or location of the issue.

mediaUrl.description: Url to image placeholder or uploaded media.

category.description: AI-categorized issue type (e.g., Pothole, Water Leakage, Waste Management, Damaged Streetlight).

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp or server timestamp of when the issue was reported.

BudgetAllocation.title: BudgetAllocation
BudgetAllocation.description: Proactive preventive maintenance budget allocations committed by local authorities.

allocationId.description: Unique identifier of the allocation log.

userId.description: ID of the user committing the budget.

country.description: Target country of the budget allocation.

riskReduction.description: Resulting reduction in predicted infrastructure failure risk (0-100).

thermalInsulationBudget.description: Budget percentage allocated to thermal pipe insulation (0-100).

acousticSensorsBudget.description: Budget percentage allocated to acoustic leak sensors (0-100).

pipeReplacementBudget.description: Budget percentage allocated to targeted cast iron pipe replacement (0-100).

emergencyBudget.description: Budget percentage allocated to emergency response team scaling (0-100).

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of when the allocation was committed.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles containing XP and credentials for login.

/budget_allocations/{allocationId}.description: Collection of proactive budget allocations submitted by community heroes acting as local authorities.
